basicDetails.schemeName: Saraswati Sadhana Yojana to Socially and Educationally Backward Girls studying in Class 9th

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The "Saraswati Sadhana Yojana to Socially and Educationally Backward Girls studying in Class 9"  is a welfare scheme by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department of Gujarat. The scheme offers free bicycles to girls enrolled in Class 9 in government and grant-in-aided schools, facilitating easier access to education and encouraging regular school attendance. This physical aid helps in improving educational participation and empowering female students from Socially and Educationally Backward classes.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - Free bicycle provided to each eligible girl student.
schemeContent.briefDescription: Under this scheme, free bicycle assistance is provided to Socially and Educationally Backward class girls studying in Class 9 in government and grant-in-aid schools across Gujarat.

children.text: The "Saraswati Sadhana Yojana to Socially and Educationally Backward Girls studying in Class 9"  is a welfare scheme by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department of Gujarat. The scheme offers free bicycles to girls enrolled in Class 9 in government and grant-in-aided schools, facilitating easier access to education and encouraging regular school attendance. This physical aid helps in improving educational participation and empowering female students from Socially and Educationally Backward classes.
Free bicycle provided to each eligible girl student.

applicationProcess.process_md:
> **Registration Process:**

**Step 1:** Visit the official website: [www.digitalgujarat.gov.in](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/)
**Step 2:** Click on the “Register” button on the homepage.
**Step 3:** You will be redirected to the registration form page.
**Step 4:** Fill in the required details such as: Name, Email ID, Mobile Number, Password, etc.
**Step 5:** Submit the registration form to create your account.
> **Log In Process:**

**Step 1:** Go to [www.digitalgujarat.gov.in](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/)
**Step 2:** Click on the “Login” button.
**Step 3:** Select the suitable login option (e.g., Citizen Login).
**Step 4:** You will be redirected to the login form page.
**Step 5:** Enter your registered Email ID/Mobile Number and Password.
**Step 6:** Click Login to access your account.
> **Apply for a New Service:**

**Step 1:** Log in to [www.digitalgujarat.gov.in](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/) using your registered credentials.
**Step 2:** User profile will appear showing all previously taken services. Click on “Request a New Service” or the relevant option.
**Step 3:** You will be redirected to a list of services. Select the desired service from the list. Click “Continue to Service”.
**Step 4:** A form will open—fill in all the required information. (Optional) Click to auto-fill details from your profile.
**Step 5:** Click “Next” after completing each section. Upload/attach the necessary documents or import them via DigiLocker.
**Step 6:** Review all information and click “Submit” to complete the application.
> **Contact Us:** [Click here.](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/SchemPortal/ContactUs.aspx)

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
- The applicant must be a permanent resident of Gujarat.
  - The applicant must be a female student.
  - The applicant must be studying in Class 9th.
  - The applicant must be enrolled in a government or grant-in-aided school in Gujarat.
  - The applicant must belong to the Socially and Educationally Backward Classes (SEBC).
  - The applicant&#39;s family income must not exceed ₹6,00,000 per annum.

children.text: The applicant must be a permanent resident of Gujarat.
The applicant must be a female student.
The applicant must be studying in Class 9th.
The applicant must be enrolled in a government or grant-in-aided school in Gujarat.
The applicant must belong to the Socially and Educationally Backward Classes (SEBC).
The applicant's family income must not exceed ₹6,00,000 per annum.
